Video.summary: In this episode, define the terms "ancient," "Greek," and "masterpiece."
Video.title: Definitions, Boundaries, and Goals

Image.alt: Definitions, Boundaries, and Goals
Definitions, Boundaries, and Goals
Definitions, Boundaries, and Goals

Video.summary: Consider how the possible oral composition of the Homeric epics might influence our reading.
Video.title: Homer I-Introduction to Epic and Iliad

Image.alt: Homer I-Introduction to Epic and Iliad
Homer I-Introduction to Epic and Iliad
Homer I-Introduction to Epic and Iliad

Video.summary: Here, explore the themes and action of books 2 through 9 of the Iliad.
Video.title: Homer II-Iliad, The Wrath of Achilles

Image.alt: Homer II-Iliad, The Wrath of Achilles
Homer II-Iliad, The Wrath of Achilles
Homer II-Iliad, The Wrath of Achilles

Video.summary: Complete the Iliad, focusing on Achilles's return to battle and its aftermath.
Video.title: Homer III-Iliad, The Return of Achilles

Image.alt: Homer III-Iliad, The Return of Achilles
Homer III-Iliad, The Return of Achilles
Homer III-Iliad, The Return of Achilles

Video.summary: Consider the Odyssey's structure as a traditional nostos, or return story.
Video.title: Homer IV-Odyssey, Introduction and Prelude

Image.alt: Homer IV-Odyssey, Introduction and Prelude
Homer IV-Odyssey, Introduction and Prelude
Homer IV-Odyssey, Introduction and Prelude

Video.summary: Consider the psychic and emotional distance Odysseus travels as he prepares to return home.
Video.title: Homer V-Odyssey, The Adventures

Image.alt: Homer V-Odyssey, The Adventures
Homer V-Odyssey, The Adventures
Homer V-Odyssey, The Adventures

Video.summary: Cover books 13 to 24, following the adventures of Odysseus on Ithaca as he completes his return.
Video.title: Homer VI-Odyssey, Reintegration

Image.alt: Homer VI-Odyssey, Reintegration
Homer VI-Odyssey, Reintegration
Homer VI-Odyssey, Reintegration

Video.summary: Look at two works that share much with the Homeric poems in the form and manner of their composition.
Video.title: Hesiod-Theogony and Works and Days

Image.alt: Hesiod-Theogony and Works and Days
Hesiod-Theogony and Works and Days
Hesiod-Theogony and Works and Days

Video.summary: Learn what the Dead Sea Scrolls are, the story of their unlikely discovery.
Video.title: The Discoveries and Their Significance

Image.alt: The Discoveries and Their Significance
The Discoveries and Their Significance
The Discoveries and Their Significance

Video.summary: Discover more about how scholars gained access to the first seven scrolls discovered at Qumran.
Video.title: The First Seven Scrolls

Image.alt: The First Seven Scrolls
The First Seven Scrolls
The First Seven Scrolls

Video.summary: Explore the scroll known as the Community Rule or Manual of Discipline.
Video.title: Opening and Reading the First Scroll

Image.alt: Opening and Reading the First Scroll
Opening and Reading the First Scroll
Opening and Reading the First Scroll

Video.summary: Consider history prior to the scrolls, beginning with the biblical period and moving forward.
Video.title: The Historical Backdrop of Ancient Judaism

Image.alt: The Historical Backdrop of Ancient Judaism
The Historical Backdrop of Ancient Judaism
The Historical Backdrop of Ancient Judaism

Video.summary: Gain insight into the appearance of Jewish sectarianism in late antiquity.
Video.title: The Rise of the Jewish Sects

Image.alt: The Rise of the Jewish Sects
The Rise of the Jewish Sects
The Rise of the Jewish Sects

Video.summary: Learn how archaeological excavations helped scholars form the hypothesis of who wrote the scrolls.
Video.title: The Dead Sea Site of the Qumran Sect

Image.alt: The Dead Sea Site of the Qumran Sect
The Dead Sea Site of the Qumran Sect
The Dead Sea Site of the Qumran Sect

Video.summary: Examine some later rabbinic texts from the 3rd century and the rise of the rabbinical tradition itself.
Video.title: The Emergence of the Rabbinic System

Image.alt: The Emergence of the Rabbinic System
The Emergence of the Rabbinic System
The Emergence of the Rabbinic System

Video.summary: Explore the history behind the famous Damascus Document.
Video.title: A Dead Sea Scroll from Medieval Cairo

Image.alt: A Dead Sea Scroll from Medieval Cairo
A Dead Sea Scroll from Medieval Cairo

Video.summary: Begin your study of Einstein's mistakes by looking at what he got right.
Video.title: What Einstein Got Right: Special Relativity

Image.alt: What Einstein Got Right: Special Relativity
What Einstein Got Right: Special Relativity
What Einstein Got Right: Special Relativity

Video.summary: Einstein followed a rocky road to his breakthrough theory of relativity.
Video.title: What Einstein Got Right: General Relativity

Image.alt: What Einstein Got Right: General Relativity
What Einstein Got Right: General Relativity
What Einstein Got Right: General Relativity

Video.summary: Learn how the concept of black holes emerged from his theory of relativity.
Video.title: Einstein's Rejection of Black Holes

Image.alt: Einstein's Rejection of Black Holes
Einstein's Rejection of Black Holes
Einstein's Rejection of Black Holes

Video.summary: General relativity predicts that objects with mass radiate gravitational waves when they interact.
Video.title: Einstein and Gravitational Waves

Image.alt: Einstein and Gravitational Waves
Einstein and Gravitational Waves
Einstein and Gravitational Waves

Video.summary: Investigate what Einstein reportedly called his "biggest blunder".
Video.title: Cosmology and the Cosmological Constant

Image.alt: Cosmology and the Cosmological Constant
Cosmology and the Cosmological Constant
Cosmology and the Cosmological Constant

Video.summary: Einstein tried to make general relativity compatible with a static universe, a move he later regretted.
Video.title: The Cosmological Constant and Dark Energy

Image.alt: The Cosmological Constant and Dark Energy
The Cosmological Constant and Dark Energy
The Cosmological Constant and Dark Energy

Video.summary: Einstein's major contributions to physics include his proof that light is made up of discrete quanta.
Video.title: What Einstein Got Right: Light Quanta

Image.alt: What Einstein Got Right: Light Quanta
What Einstein Got Right: Light Quanta
What Einstein Got Right: Light Quanta

Video.summary: Probe Einstein's devotion to the principle of determinism.
Video.title: Does God Play Dice with the Universe?

Does God Play Dice with the Universe?
